description: Create a 'Worst Case' release scenario for the Chlorine inventory (CAS 7782-50-5) at the Riverside Water Reclamation Plant. The scenario should be named 'Railcar Rupture - Worst Case' and use the following parameters: Scenario Type 'Worst Case', Wind Speed 1.5 meters/second, Stability Class F, Release Duration 10 minutes, Quantity Released 180,000 pounds, and Distance to Endpoint 14.0 miles. Export the scenario details to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\scenario_report.pdf.
